chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SMA 14 of 2020 _________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge _________________________________________________________ For hearing of main petition 04.03.2020. Mr. Mian Mushtaq Ahmed, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Omair Akran, legal heir 2/petitioner. Ms. Sidra Akran, legal heir 3. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa, witness. Mr. Muhammad Jamil, witness. Agha Faisal J. Per the report of the Deputy Registrar (O.S.) dated 13.02.2020 (“Report)” all requirements in respect hereof have been completed and publication has also been effected, to which no objections have been received. Petitioner/legal heir 2, legal heir 3, and witnesses are present in Court. Those present reaffirm contents of the petition and the affidavits. Legal heir 1 is being represented by the legal heir 3 in view of her general power of attorney, which has already been seen and taken into consideration by the Deputy Registrar per the Report. In view hereof, it appears that this is a non-contentious matter and there is no impediment to the grant hereof, hence, this petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue letters of administration and succession certificate, in respect of assets identified per the Report, as per Rules. J U D G E Farooq PS/*
